title: NE20 0TA, Mr Ian Howson: permit partial surrender issued - EPR/VP3539FN
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mr Ian Howson   Installation name: Kearsley Farm Poultry Unit   Permit number: EPR/VP3539FN   "
